'''Cree'n'aak Palace''' was the residence of His Potency the [[Shreeftut]], the supreme ruler of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]]. It was located on the [[Ssi-ruu]]vi homeworld and Imperium capital of [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]], deep in the remote [[Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster]] which was far away from the main disk of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Cree'n'aak Palace was nearly a kilometer tall and covered hundreds of square kilometers. It was located on the northern continent of the Ssi-ruuvi homeworld. Within the fortress were hundreds of thousands of [[Shreeftut|His Potency's]] loyal advisors, supporters, and attendants.

It was also the location of the planet's largest military installation, which was on the palace grounds. Housed in the palace complex were all of the planet's weapon and military technology factories, which made control and inventory of their military hardware very simple.

The imperial palace also housed the head of the planetary computer and information network. Cree'n'aak was practically a city unto itself, one that was forbidden to the rest of the population, and accessible only to Ssi-ruuvi rulers, the privileged, and the bureaucrats.<ref name="The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>
